mappings.title: Unsigned image weakens build provenance and artifact integrity
mappings.rationale: Container images must be attributable, verifiable and protected against tampering.

mappings.title: Privileged runner weakens isolated build guarantees
mappings.rationale: Privileged CI runners increase the probability of build environment compromise.

mappings.title: Docker socket mounted in runner breaks builder isolation
mappings.rationale: Docker socket exposure can allow host or sibling container compromise.
